summary: Completed comprehensive testing of auto-translation feature for LearnHub course platform. All backend translation APIs and frontend UI components working correctly with Deepseek AI integration.
passed_tests: ✅ API /translate/text translates single text using Deepseek AI
✅ API /translate/course/{course_id} translates course title and description to multiple languages
✅ API /courses/{course_id}/create-translation creates new translated course with correct language tag
✅ Admin can see translate button (Languages icon) on course cards in admin courses page
✅ AI Auto-Translate dialog opens when clicking translate button
✅ Target language dropdown shows all 5 supported languages (en, zh-TW, zh-CN, ja, ko)
✅ Language selection works correctly in translate dialog
✅ Start translation button is enabled when language is selected
✅ Translation process completes successfully with AI processing
✅ Success message displays with translated course title and language name
✅ New translated course is created with correct language tag (繁體中文)
✅ Course title and description are translated by Deepseek AI
✅ Lesson content is translated along with the course
✅ TranslateDialog component properly integrated in admin courses management
✅ All translation endpoints return correct status codes and data
✅ Deepseek AI integration working correctly for text translation
✅ Course language badges display correctly with Globe icon
✅ Translation dialog UI matches design requirements
✅ Error handling works for translation failures
✅ Admin authentication and authorization for translation features

success_percentage.backend: 100% (26/26 tests passed including 3 new translation API tests)
